prestazioni: VR30DDTT (3.0L twin-turbo V6) forced induction upgrade with Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (106mm billet compressor wheels, 62mm turbine wheels, 0.82 A/R turbine housings) paired with Tomei 3.5-inch titanium turbo manifolds and custom 3-inch downpipes with GReddy Revolution RS 4-inch cat-back exhaust system (dual 3.5-inch titanium tips, 70mm internal piping)

HKS Hi-Power Spec-V 2.0 intercooler kit (12-row core, 60% larger than OEM, 3-inch mandrel-bent aluminum piping) with HKS SSQV5 blow-off valves and custom heat-wrapped intake piping (3.5-inch diameter, silicone couplers with aluminum charge pipes)

Nismo S-Tune engine management with Cobb Accessport V3 (custom VR30DDTT Stage 3+ tune, 22psi peak boost, 93 octane target AFR 11.8:1, 8,500rpm redline) paired with Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450LPH dual fuel pumps, and AEM 3.5bar MAP sensor for precise load mapping
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and overfenders with 20mm extended wheel arches) paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (dual functional vents, 50% weight reduction) and custom carbon fiber rear diffuser (3D-printed ABS core, carbon weave overlay)

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2 19x10.5 +22 front / 19x11.5 +30 rear wheels (custom matte bronze finish, 5x114.3 PCD, 20mm spacer adapters) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear) with custom Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm two-piece rotors, titanium pistons) and Project Mu G12 brake pads

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable dampers, 30-way compression/rebound, 50mm front/46mm rear monotube design) with custom polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 62mm front control arms, rear subframe bushings) and Cusco front strut bar (2-point, 30mm hollow steel construction)
